# Verification & Provenance Index

Auto-generated by `scripts/gen_provenance.py`. Every experiment carries a `PROVENANCE.md` card (attribution, run command, seed, verification signals, artifacts, one-command regen), per Mo (ICML 2026)'s observability / attribution / reproducibility criteria for AI-agent-generated science.

**Attribution.** Human author & director: Jawaun Brown. Experiment code, sweeps, and paper drafts generated by an AI coding agent (Claude Code) under the author's direction and review.
